response:
1. area of zen garden = πr²  
   area for dining tables = 2 × πr²  
   total area = 20 × 15 = 300 m²  
   300 - πr² = 2πr²  
   300 = 3πr²  
   r² = 100/π  
   r = √(100/π) ≈ 5.64 m  

2. radius of fountain = r/3 ≈ 1.88 m  
   surface area of cylinder (excluding base) = 2πrh = 2π × 1.88 × 1.5 ≈ 17.8 m²  
   cost = 17.8 × 50 = 890  

r  
890
